steps.name: CI grep guard against hardcoded prompt strings (BR-4)
Admin UI tab Quan tri > Prompts
Wire remaining tests + BR-1 race test (AC5)

decisions: 8 prompt templates extracted programmatically (regex over fenced code blocks in docs/specs/prompts.md, repr()'d into seed.py) rather than hand-retyped, to guarantee exact Vietnamese diacritics -- verified against Jinja2's own undeclared-variable check.

'persona' variable (used by outline/script/storyboard templates per the spec's own 'phai tu mang theo persona' note) and ranking.score's today/w_recency/w_relevance/w_trust/w_confirm are declared explicitly in variables[] even though the spec's short 'Bien:' line only lists a subset -- BR-3 requires the template not use anything undeclared, over-declaring is fine.

Audit trail (BR-2/security.md 'who/when') implemented as activated_by/activated_at columns directly on prompt_versions rather than a separate audit-log table -- narrower, sufficient for this task's stated need, revisit only if a cross-entity audit view becomes a real requirement.

BR-1 concurrent-activate race (AC5) handled via two sequential UPDATEs (deactivate current, then activate target) relying on the partial unique index (migration 009) to raise IntegrityError if a racing transaction's target commits in between -- translated to ActivateConflictError -> 409. Verified via a fake-session test simulating the IntegrityError since no live Postgres is available in this sandbox to prove the real race (flagged as a Known Gap, same pattern as other Epic 3/4 tasks).

prompt-eval CLI's 'eval' is render-level only (parse_ok / numbers_preserved / length across the 10 fixture topics) -- no LLM call, matching the task's explicit 'Out: eval tu cham bang LLM (v1.1)' scope boundary.

Admin UI (Step 8) built following the existing ApiKeysTable.tsx pattern; tsc --noEmit and eslint run clean for the new files (one pre-existing lucide-react type-declaration gap shared with ApiKeysTable, not introduced here). No live browser available in this sandbox to exercise it per rules/testing.md's UI rule -- flagged as a Known Gap consistent with other frontend-touching tasks in this project's history.
